title: Clip facts (v1) — the mechanical, cached-per-source truth
description: Produced by tools/inventory.py. ONLY immutable facts; judgment (take choice, clean verdicts, richness) stays at decision time. The editor reads this + takes_packed.md; it never re-derives these (Law 3).

audio.description: needs_stereo_fix / one_ear drive RULES A6 at render time.

punchin_max.description: Max punch scale before quality drops, from source vs output resolution.

upscaled_at_1x.description: True = the reframe already upsamples (e.g. landscape→vertical).

raw_cuts.description: Hidden internal cut times (visual scdet + audio-level jumps, merged). Best-effort DANGER LINES (RULES B5): never edit within ~0.5s of one. Conservative by design — over-flagging is safer; the director + human are the backstop.

pre_edited.description: ≥3 raw cuts → the source is not continuous; no contiguous punch-ins (RULES B5).
